_comment: Damodaran FCFF inputs for Micron Technology (MU). Populate from Wisesheets 10Y data. Amounts in USD millions.

_notes.revenue_cagr_high: 20% reflects HBM structural uplift + DRAM recovery cycle. Use cycle-normalized revenue as base, not peak. Bear case: 10-12%.
_notes.target_ebit_margin_high: 38% reflects HBM premium mix at full ramp. Current margin at cycle peak is 47%+ but cycle-normalized is ~25-30%. 38% is an optimistic mid-case assuming HBM structurally raises the floor.
_notes.stable_ebit_margin: 28% reflects a future where HBM is ~30-40% of revenue mix at structurally higher margins. Conservative assumption.
_notes.sales_to_capital_ratio_high: 0.7x — memory is highly capital intensive. CHIPS Act reduces some burden but new fabs are expensive.
_notes.wacc_high: 11% = risk-free 4.5% + beta 1.3 * ERP 4.9% (higher beta reflects commodity cycle volatility)
_notes.effective_tax_rate: Micron effective tax rate ~12% with CHIPS Act manufacturing credits
